articles.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Senegal routs 10-man Iraq 5-0 to keep knockout hopes alive
articles.description: Senegal thrashed 10-man Iraq 5-0 in a crucial World Cup qualifier, significantly boosting their hopes of advancing. Pape Gueye netted twice after Habib Diarra opened the scoring early. Despite an early red card for Iraq's Rebin Sulaka, Senegal capitalized, with Ismaila Sarr and Iliman Ndiaye also finding the net. Now with three points and a strong goal difference, Senegal awaits other results to determine their fate in the knockout stages.

articles.title: Winning FIFA World Cup group takes a backseat to getting ready for the knockout stage for some teams
articles.description: FFIA World Cup 2026: Coaches at the football tournament are shifting strategies, prioritizing player rest and injury prevention over group stage dominance. Norway, without star Haaland, lost to France but focused on a longer tournament run. Portugal's Martinez aims for wins, while Colombia's Lorenzo considers opponent matchups. Spain's de la Fuente emphasizes winning every game to prepare for eventual tough opponents.

articles.title: Pakistan vs Netherlands, West Indies vs Ireland, England vs New Zealand Women's T20 World Cup match today: Predicted playing XI, head-to-head, pitch report, weather update

England has already secured a semifinal spot, while West Indies are in a strong position. New Zealand's fate depends on other results, and Pakistan and the Netherlands aim to avoid a winless tournament. Pitch reports from Bristol and London suggest a preference for chasing, with dew being a factor at The Oval.

articles.title: Phil Mickelson allegedly forced out of two luxury golf clubs amid repeated personal conduct allegations, report says
articles.description: Phil Mickelson's conduct controversies have grown beyond the initial allegations at The Farms Golf Club. A new report by Alan Shipnuck places his removal within a broader pattern, citing expulsions from two additional private clubs, the Madison Club and The Bridges in Rancho Santa Fe, on grounds of personal conduct. An unrelated 2015 account from Ashley Perez, former wife of golfer Pat Perez, has also emerged publicly. Mickelson has not personally addressed any of the claims, with his legal team maintaining that all allegations are false while he remains with his family during a private health matter.

articles.title: Spain vs Uruguay: Who is Alex Baena? Midfielder's goal sends Spain into World Cup knockout stage
articles.description: Spain defeated Uruguay 1-0 to finish top of Group H and qualify for the FIFA World Cup knockout stage, with Alex Baena scoring the decisive goal. The 24-year-old Atletico Madrid winger netted his first World Cup goal, continuing his rise after spells with Villarreal and Girona. The defeat knocked Uruguay out of the tournament.
